common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: merchant_id
common_params.description: Shopee’s unique identifier for a merchant. Required for all merchant level requests(CB CNSC user calling global product related APIs).

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, merchant_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Update global model. Only for China mainland sellers and Korean sellers.

request_params.name: global_model

children.description:
The weight of this global model, the unit is KG.

If don't set the weight of this global model, will use the weight of global item by default.

If set the dimension of this global model, them must set the weight of this global model.
children.name: weight

children.description:
The dimension of this global model.

If don't set the dimension of this global model, will use the dimension of global item by default.
children.name: dimension

children.description: The height of package for this global model, the unit is CM.
children.name: package_height

children.description: The length of package for this global model, the unit is CM.
children.name: package_length

children.description: The width of package for this global model, the unit is CM.
children.name: package_width

children.description:
Pre-order information of this global model.


Notes: 

If don't set the DTS of this global model, will use the DTS of the global item by default.
children.name: pre_order

children.description: Days to ship. Please get the days_to_ship range from the get_dts_limit API.
children.name: days_to_ship

request_params.description: Sku setting for global model. Limit is [1,50].

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking.
